name: Invoke-Obfuscation VAR+ Launcher - Security
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Jonathan Cheong, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Invoke-Obfuscation VAR+ Launcher - Security
SIGMA Description: Detects Obfuscated use of Environment Variables to execute PowerShell

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%cmd%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%"set%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%-f%') AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%/c%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%/r%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Invoke-Obfuscation VAR+ Launcher - Security on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%cmd%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%"set%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%-f%') AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%/c%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%/r%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Invoke-Obfuscation VAR+ Launcher - Security
